snippet.title: [EPISOD PENUH] Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa - EP1
snippet.description:
Hubungan Kasih Maisara dan papanya Dato Raqib mula tegang selepas pemergian mamanya. Untuk membalas segala rasa marah dan sakit hatinya kepada Dato Raqib. Maisara membatalkan majlis pertunangannya bersama Aidil membuatkan Dato Raqib malu kepada keluarga Aidil lebih-lebih lagi, Maisaralah yang mahu bertunang dengan Aidil.

Sebuah karya Siti Rosmizah.
@sitirosmizahsemail
@sronesdnbhd

snippet.description:
Nazril bertemu Aidil setelah kejadian Maisara menyatakan cintanya. Dia sendiri malu dengan kejadian itu apabila ramai mata melihat adegan itu. Maisara terus mengganggu Nazril dengan panggilan telefon yang akhirnya emak Nazril yang menjawab panggilan itu dan Maisara tanpa segan silu mengatakan dia mahu berkahwin dengan Nazril.

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves ! 

Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/KuttyPattas

Song - Kutty Pattas
Composed by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi
Featuring - Ashwin Kumar, Reba Monica John
Sung by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi, Rakshita Suresh
Lyrics - A.Pa Raja
Directed by - Venki
Cinematography - Harish Kannan
Choreography - Sandy Master
Set - Amaran
Editing - Krishna Kumar
DI - Suresh Ravi
Costumes - Sathya NJ
Stills - Kiransa Photography

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: [BM] PMPL MY/SG SEASON 3 | W1D1 | El Clasico Team Secret and Yoodo GANK
snippet.description:
PUBG MOBILE PRO LEAGUE MY/SG returns for Season 3! The battle will feature 20 professional PUBG MOBILE teams from MY/SG across 4 weeks of Country League and Finals, with a massive prize pool of USD 150,000! 
 
Who will be the top 16 teams advanced to the Country Finals? Who will be the champion for Season 3?  Who will be representing MY/SG to compete in the PMPL SEA Finals Season 3? Let's find out! 
 
These are the teams that competing in Weekdays:
Group A
Geek Fam, Todak PUBGM, Damansara Flash Vision, JP NSEA
Group B
Team SMG, IPW LX, Team Bosskurr, Dingoz MPX
Group C
Team Secret, Evos VIP, J8 Esports, AL Ikhlas R2k
Group D
Yoodo Gank, Dr. TA, Homebois, NED Brotherhood
Group E
Team Whales, RSG, Anti Circle, TRX Esports

《乘风破浪的姐姐》是芒果TV推出的女团成长综艺节目，与其他女团选秀不同，该节目召集了30位1990年之前出生的女艺人，并最终选出7位成员组成女团。在第二季节目中，大众评审按照年龄分为30+和30-两大阵营。赛制上也变得更加残酷，初舞台表演要有Vocal（唱）和Dance（跳）两项，两项分开表演且缺一不可。节目焦点从女性的精彩绽放渗透到她们成功背后付出的努力和奋斗，表现出丰富多样化的女性价值观，诠释自信奋斗的“她力量”，让更多女性能从中感受到自我价值的体现。

snippet.title: Korea Utara ancam Malaysia, rakyat usah gentar
snippet.description:
BERITA SEMASA 23 MAC 2021

Baru-baru ini gempar Korea Utara bertindak memutuskan hubungan diplomatik bersama Malaysia. Ia susulan tindakan mengekstradisi warganegara republik itu, Mun Chol Myong ke Amerika Syarikat terhadap kesalahan menyeludup barangan mewah larangan dari Singapura ke Korea Utara serta pengubahan wang haram yang melanggar sekatan Pertubuhan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu (PBB).

Muzik: www.bensound.com

#SinarHarian #BeritaSemasa #KoreaUtara #Malaysia #diplomatik

snippet.title: (OST Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa) Lia Aziz - Kucu Kuca [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Lia Aziz merupakan seorang penyanyi baru yang mempertaruhkan lagu berbentuk pop yang bertajuk 'Kucu Kuca', single pertama beliau hasil ciptaan Ejai Azarra dan Afiez Azam.

Kucu Kuca
Lia Aziz
Lagu : Ejai Aziz
Lirik : Ejai Aziz
Publisher: MVM Production Sdn Bhd
Music Producer & Arranger : Afiez Azam
Vocal Producer : Ernie Zakri, Afiez Azam
Studio: Rusa Studio
Mixing: Vincent Chan
Mastering: CL Toh (Mastering One Studio)

Official IG:
@liaaa.aziz
https://www.instagram.com/liaaa.aziz/

Music Video Production
Executive Producer : Brattbob
Director/DOP/Editor/Post Production : Akmal Hakeem Harris
Art by  NotJustDessert
Art Director : Hannah Shafiqah
Art Team :  Amir Johari, Amina Shahirah, Fauzan Hak, Hazirah Rahman, Resha
Production Assistant: Darrien Danker, Jon THC, Amirul Rizuan, Nas Amirul
Make Up: Siew Keng & Yikki Yip
Sponsor: Sophea Rose, Geb.
Still Photography : Azim Sharif


Lirik 'Kucu Kuca' Lia Aziz:

Kelip bintang nun jauh dia sana
Sudah pastinya ku fikirkan dirimu
Deru angin bertiupan berlagu
Inginku sampai rinduan di hati

Lagu cinta ini untuk kamu
Sambilku tenung bulan menghiasi malam
Dan tercipta bibit kata indah
Dan lagukan rasaku

Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Serentak dengan nadaku
Bersama jari jemariku
Menyeru menari bersama diriku...

Namamu ku rahsiakan
Dan telah terpatri di hatiku
Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Opss alamak
Aku jatuh cinta

#KucuKuca #LiaAziz

snippet.title: Gara-Gara Ini, Korut Putuskan Hubungan Diplomatik dengan Malaysia
snippet.description:
Berita Lainnya: Tinggal Sejengkal, Begini Holding Ultra Mikro Versi Erick
Link: http://bit.ly/3f2pqLo

Kabar mengejutkan datang dari Korea Utara. Negara pimpinan Kim Jong Un tersebut memutuskan hubungan diplomatik dengan Malaysia. Pemerintah Korea Utara menjelaskan keputusan ini diambil setelah Negeri Jiran mengekstradisi seorang warga Korut ke Amerika Serikat.

Selengkapnya dalam program Squawk Box CNBC Indonesia (Jumat, 19/03/2021) berikut ini.

Terus ikuti berita ekonomi bisnis dan analisis mendalam hanya di https://www.cnbcindonesia.com/.

CNBC Indonesia terafiliasi dengan CNBC Internasional dan beroperasi di bawah grup Transmedia dan tergabung bersama Trans TV, Trans7, Detikcom, Transvision, CNN Indonesia dan CNN Indonesia.com.
CNBC Indonesia dapat dinikmati melalui tayangan Transvision channel 805 atau streaming melalui aplikasi CNBC Indonesia yang dapat di download di playstore atau iOS.

《王牌對王牌第六季》是浙江衛視推出的暖情互動挑戰類棚內綜藝節目，由浙江衛視節目中心制作，#沈騰 #賈玲 #華晨宇 #關曉彤 組成固定MC“王牌家族”。 
由#沈濤 擔任主持，#宋亞軒 擔任王牌少年！

snippet.description:

Web ▶https://bit.ly/2BILLeo
App ▶ https://bit.ly/2FKCnGI

💌ABOUT RUNNING MAN

Running Man is a reality-variety show that stars Yu Jae Seok, Kim Jong Kook, Haha, Jee Seok Jin, Song Ji Hyo, Lee Kwang Soo, Jeon So Min, and Yang Se Chan. In each episode, they must complete missions at various places to win the race. Each mission is action-packed and hilarious as each member tries to beat the others using their wits and skills. Each week, is filled with fun that includes trust and betrayal, knowledge and skills, physical strengths, and outrageous penalties. Sometimes, they work as a team and cooperate for one common goal. Other times, they betray each other throughout the race in order to win all the honor and glory for themselves. You will be brought to tears each week from laughing at their silly antics.

snippet.title: Korea Utara-Malaysia Makin Panas
snippet.description:
Berita lainnya:
Goldman Sachs Ramal Minyak ke US$ 80, Kalau Drop Serok!
http://bit.ly/2PcdpZ6

Hubungan Korea Utara dan Malaysia juga semakin panas. Diplomat Korea Utara di Malaysia menutup kedutaan mereka dan kembali ke Korea Utara pada Minggu, 21 Maret 2021. Langkah ini diambil setelah Pyongyang memutuskan hubungan diplomatik dengan Malaysia terkait ekstradisi seorang warga negaranya ke Amerika Serikat.

Simak informasi selengkapnya dalam program Squawk Box di CNBC Indonesia (Senin, 22/03/2021) berikut ini.

Terus ikuti berita ekonomi bisnis dan analisis mendalam hanya di https://www.cnbcindonesia.com/.

CNBC Indonesia terafiliasi dengan CNBC Internasional dan beroperasi di bawah grup Transmedia dan tergabung bersama Trans TV, Trans7, Detikcom, Transvision, CNN Indonesia dan CNN Indonesia.com.
CNBC Indonesia dapat dinikmati melalui tayangan Transvision channel 805 atau streaming melalui aplikasi CNBC Indonesia yang dapat di download di playstore atau iOS.

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

(C) 2021 Epic Records. With Not So Fast LLC.

#Giveon #HeartbreakAnniversary #WhenItsAllSaidAndDoneTakeTime

snippet.title: KPN dedah bekas pegawai atasan PDRM turut terima rasuah
snippet.description:
Kegiatan rasuah dalam pasukan polis amat berleluasa pada satu ketika dulu sehingga ada Ketua Polis Negara (KPN) sebelum ini yang menerima wang daripada sindiket jenayah.

Dakwaan itu dibuat oleh Ketua Polis Negara Abdul Hamid Bador tanpa menyebut sebarang nama dalam sidang medianya hari ini. 

Menurutnya, masih ada pegawai-pegawa tinggi polis yang telah bersara turut menggunakan kedudukan sebelumnya untuk meminta "pelbagai perkara" daripada pegawai yang bertugas. 

Sumber video: https://www.facebook.com/jsjnpdrm/videos/527051865365332

snippet.description:

Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I thought that you'd remember, but it seems that you forgot
It’s hard for me to blame you when you were already lost
Oh, yeah
I'm tired of always waiting
Oh, yeah, yeah
I see you changed your number, that's why you don’t get my calls
I gave you all of me, now you don't wanna be involved
Oh, yeah, yeah
I really gotta face it
Oh, yeah, yeah

[Pre-Chorus]
I just wanna be the one
But to you, we're already done
Tell me, why'd you have to hit and run me?
Now I'm all alone, cryin' ugly
You broke my heart just for fun
Took my love and just left me numb
Now it's eight in the morning
Hate in the morning (All because of you)

[Chorus]
Another story that's sad and true
I can feel the pain, can you?
You had to be the one to let me down
To colour me blue
Hate to see you with someone new
I’ll put a curse on her and you
Ain’t no looking back, now you're dead and gone
My love is gone too

[Post-Chorus]
All my love is go-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-one
All my love is go-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-one
All my love is go-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-one
All my love is gone
Now you’re dead and gone

[Verse 2]
All my love is gone and the hate has grown
Standing all alone and I'm searching for something
But I can't feel nothing
I pack my bags and go
This don't feel like home
Too much darkness for a rainbow, I feel so used
How am I supposed to live without you? I refuse, yeah

[Pre-Chorus]
I just wanna be the one
But to you, we’re already done
Tell me, why'd you have to hit and run me?
Now I'm all alone, cryin' ugly
You broke my heart just for fun
Took my love and just left me numb
Now it's eight in the morning
Hate in the morning (All because of you)

[Chorus]
Another story that's sad and true
I can feel the pain, can you?
You had to be the one to let me down
To colour me blue
Hate to see you with someone new
I'll put a curse on her and you
Ain't no looking back, now you're dead and gone
My love is gone too

[Post-Chorus]
All my love is go-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-one
All my love is go-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-one
All my love is go-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-one
All my love is gone
Now you're dead and gone

Konsert Jelajah Suria kembali ke skrin digital anda dan akan bersiaran secara 'Live' serentak di semua platform Suria Malaysia!

Nantikan persembahan hebat daripada Dato Awie, Misha Omar, Dayang Nurfaizah, Haqiem Rusli, Iman Troye, Lah Ahmad, Farisha Iris, Bob Sentuhan, Masdo dan Floor 88!

Anda juga boleh berinteraksi secara langsung bersama penyampai-penyampai Suria; Issey, Ajak, Fizi Ali, Rara, Tyzo, Suraya dan DJ Lin di media sosial Suria Malaysia ketika 'Live'.

Jangan lupa untuk rebut peluang menangi wang tunai, barangan eksklusif Suria dan Cinderella Miracle World di segmen 'Giveaway' nanti.

Konsert Digital Jelajah Suria
Rabu, 24 Mac 2021
Jam 9.00 malam

Tengok tau!

snippet.title: Afgan - M.I.A (feat. Jackson Wang) (Official MV)
snippet.description:
Afgan - M.I.A (feat. Jackson Wang) 
https://music.empi.re/afganjackson

Music Producer : Happie & Chaz “Tha Aristocrats” 
Writers/Composers: Chaz Jackson, Dashawn White, Afgan, Jackson Wang, Benny Mayne, Emily Vaughn, Orlando Williamson, Brandon Hamlen, Ishmael Montague, Carl Taylor Jr.

M.I.A
Now you always wear your heart upon your sleeve
I still think about you, even when I sleep
Why you always worried that I’m gonna leave
You don’t have to do that, baby now with me

You ain’t gotta switch up like that
Know you want love like that
Treat you so good right back
Don’t say you want it
Say you want love like that
Love like that
And just like that
You come right back

You know you got my heart
And that’s all I ever want
I told you from the start
That I won’t 

Won’t go M.I.A,  go M.I.A
No need to be scared now
Know I’m gonna stay around 
Won’t go M.I.A, go M.I.A
No need to be scared now
Know I’m gonna stay around 

I’m waiting like that
Cloudy bay on deck
Loving you no test
Put myself on a bet
Don’t hesitate
Nah nah nah nah
My lovin for you girl it’s true
Oh no o o 
Got me at hello
It’s like you’re magic how you flipped my emotions
Don’t try to assume
Girl I’m not leaving you
I’m swimming in feelings
Your love got me fiening
‘Jackson’

Bagaimanapun tidak dapat dipastikan punca kekecohan itu tercetus dan menerusi video yang tersebar, kekecohan itu berjaya dileraikan tanpa berlaku insiden lebih buruk.

What you doin
(what you doin)

Where you at
(where you at)

Oh you got plans  
(you got plans)

Don’t say that       
(shut yo trap)

I’m sippin wine     
(sip sip)

In a robe               
(drip rip)

I look too good    
(look too good)

To be alone         
(wooohooo)

My house clean  
(house clean)

My pool warm   
(pool warm)

Just shaved        
(smooth like a new born)

We should be dancing, romancing
In the east wing and the west wing
Of this mansion, wus happenin

I aint playin no games
Every word that I say 
Is coming straight from the heart
(so if you tryna lay in these arms)

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)
Imma leave the open girl
(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that you’re coming through)

You’re so sweet 
(so sweet)

So tight
(so tight)

I won’t bite
(ahh ahh)

Unless you like
(unless you like)

If you smoke
(what you smoke)

I got that haze
(purple haze)

And if you’re hungry girl I got filets
(woohooo)

Ooh baby don’t keep me waiting
There’s so much love we could be making
I’m talking kissing, Cuddling
Rose petals in the bathtub
Lets jump in, Its bubblin

I aint playin no games
Every word that I say 
Is coming straight from the heart
(so if you tryna lay in these arms)

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)
Imma leave the open girl
(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that you’re coming through)

La la laaa la la la la la 
(I need you baby)

La la laaa la la la la
(I gotta see you baby)

La la laaa la la la la 
(Girl I’m tryna give you this)
(aaaaahhhhhhhhhh)

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)
Imma leave the open girl
(Imma leave the door open, hopin)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that you’re coming through)


The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: [Official Stage MV] Theme Song "Chuang To-Gather, Go!" 主题曲《我们一起闯》舞台MV | 创造营 CHUANG2021
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

《创造营2021》是由腾讯视频出品的国际青年文化交流男团成长综艺，致力于充分展现新时代国际青年人的音乐舞台表现力、青春活力和拼搏向上力。节目召集来自不同国家、不同经纪公司和院校的近百名学员，在多位榜样前辈的引领、助力、陪伴下一同进行文化与专业交流、打破重组迎接挑战，一同探索真我热血追梦。

snippet.description:
New Hero x New Mode Cinematic has been released!
The new hero Beatrix is arriving with her "stunt doubles" to save the Eruditio. Now she is confronted with an army of Iron Sentries... For exciting and powerful battle scenes, check  Lethal Nexus Chapter 2: Impact right now!

vi.title: Lethal Nexus: Xung Kích | Trailer Điện Ảnh | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
vi.description:
Bản Điện Ảnh Về Tướng Mới x Chế Độ Mới đã ra mắt!
Vị tướng mới Beatrix chuẩn bị tiến bước giải cứu Eruditio cùng "bản sao thế thân" của mình. Giờ đây, cô nàng đang phải đối đầu với một đoàn quân Thiết Giáp Hộ Vệ... Để xem thêm những khung cảnh đối đầu hấp dẫn hơn, hãy xem Lethal Nexus Chương 2 ngay nhé!
Hỏi nhỏ chút: Bạn có thể tìm xem video có chứa những yếu tố nào về chế độ Sinh Tồn không? Trổ tài đi nào!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ar.title: الرابطة المميتة: صدمة | العرض السينمائي | مواجهة الأبطال - MLBB
ar.description:
صدر العرض السينمائي للبطلة الجديدة x الوضع الجديد 
البطلة الجديدة بياتريكس تصل مع "خدعة الإزدواج" لإنقاذ الإيروديتيو. هي الآن في مواجهة جيش من الحراس المعدنيون... لمشاهد معركة مثيرة وقوية، تفقد الرابطة المميتة الجزء 2: صدمة!
بيض عيد الفصح: هل يمكنك معرفة عناصر وضع الصمود التي أخفيناها في الفيديو؟ تفقدهم الآن!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

tr.title: Ölümcül Bağlantı: Çarpışma | Sinematik Tanıtım | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
tr.description:
Yeni Kahraman x Yeni Mod Sinematiği yayınlandı!
Yeni kahraman Beatrix, Eruditio'yu kurtarmak için gizli silahları ile geliyor. Şimdi bir Demir Muhafız ordusuyla karşı karşıya... Heyecan verici ve göz alıcı savaş sahneleri için Ölümcül Bağlantı Bölüm 2: Çarpışma'ya hemen şimdi göz at!
Easter eggs: Videoda Hayatta Kalma modunun hangi elementlerini gizlediğimizi bulabilir misin? Kendine güveniyorsan hemen şansını dene!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBÖlümcülBağlantı

id.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Trailer Sinematik | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
id.description:
Sinematik Hero Baru x Mode Baru telah dirilis!
Hero baru Beatrix segera hadir dengan "Stunt Double"-nya untuk menyelamatkan Eruditio. Sekarang, dia dihadapkan dengan pasukan dari Iron Sentry... Untuk menyaksikan adegan pertempuran yang seru dan kuat, cek Lethal Nexus Chapter 2: Impact sekarang juga!
Easter Egg: Apakah Anda dapat menemukan elemen apa dari Mode Survival yang kami sembunyikan dalam video? Cek sekarang!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

km.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Cinematic Trailer | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
km.description:
ឈុតឆាករឿងពីតួអង្គថ្មី x វគ្គថ្មី បានចេញផ្សាយហើយ!
តួអង្គថ្មី Beatrix នឹងមកដល់ជាមួយនឹងតួជំនួស "stunt doubles" ដើម្បីជួយសង្គ្រោះ Eruditio។ នាពេលនេះ នាកំពុងតែប្រយុទ្ធតទល់ជាមួយនឹងកងទ័ពនៃ Iron Sentries... សម្រាប់ឈុតប្រកួតដ៏រំភើប និង អស្ចារ្យ សូមចូលឆែមើល Lethal Nexus ជំពូកទី ២៖ Impact នាពេលនេះទៅ!
Easter eggs: តើអ្នកអាចរកឃើញវត្ថុសំខាន់ៗដែលយើងបានលាក់នៅក្នុងវគ្គ Survival mode នៅក្នុងវីដេអូនេះដែរឬទេ? មកចូលរួមទស្សនាទាំងអស់គ្នា!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ja.title: リーサルネクサス：衝撃 | トレーラー本編 | モバイルレジェンド
ja.description:
新ヒーロー×新モードの予告編が公開！
新しいヒーローのベアトリクスは、学者の城を救うために「スタントダブル」を持って到着した。今、彼女の前に鋼鉄の衛兵隊が立ち塞がる...エキサイティングでパワフルな戦闘シーンは、リーサルネクサス第2章「激突」をチェック！！
イースターエッグ：ビデオに隠されたサバイバルモードの要素を、あなたは見つけられるかな？いますぐチェック！

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ru.title: СМЕРТЕЛЬНЫЙ НЕКСУС: УДАР | ТРЕЙЛЕР | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
ru.description:
Новый герой и видео нового режима уже выпущено!
Новый герой, Беатрис, спешит на помощь Эрудитио вместе со своими "дублерами". Теперь ей будет противостоять армия Железных часовых... Смертельный Нексус, Глава 2: Удар представляет вам захватывающие сцены боёв, смотрите прямо сейчас!
Пасхалки: А вы сможете узнать, какие элементы режима Выживание скрыты в видео? Напишите в комментариях!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

ms.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Treler Sinematik | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
ms.description:
Wira Baharu x Sinematik Mod Baharu telah dilancarkan!
Wira baharu Beatrix telah tiba bersama-sama "pendua lagak ngeri" dirinya untuk menyelamatkan Eruditio. Kini dia berhadapan dengan bala tentera Iron Sentry... Bagi babak pertempuran yang menarik dan hebat, lihat Lethal Nexus Bahagian 2: Impact sekarang!
Kejutan tersembunyi: Bolehkah anda mencari elemen-elemen Mod Survival yang telah kami sembunyikan di dalam video? Lihatnya sekarang!

#MobileLegendsBangBang
#MLBBLethalNexus

pt.description:
Nova Heroína x Lançamento de Novo Modo Cinematográfico!
A Nova Heroína Beatrix está chegando com seus "dublês" para salvar o Erudito. Agora ela é confrontada com um exército de Sentinelas de Ferro... Para mais cenas de batalha emocionantes e poderosas, verifique "Nexus Letal - Capítulo 2: Impacto" agora mesmo!

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: Ali Gatie - Can't Let You Go [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Watch the official music video for Can't Let You Go by Ali Gatie. 
🔔 Subscribe to the channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/aligatie?sub_confirmation=1
Listen to the brand new single by Ali Gatie here: https://aligatie.lnk.to/cantletyougo
Pre-save the upcoming EP 'The Idea of Her' releasing on March 26th now: https://aligatie.lnk.to/theideaofher

Follow Ali Gatie:
Web: https://www.aligatie.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/aligatie
Facebook: https://facebook.com/aligatie
Twitter: https://twitter.com/aligatie
Text ME !! 1313-800-8283

Ali Gatie is a singer-songwriter renowned for her hit songs “It’s You,” “What If I Told You That I Love You,” “Moonlight,” “Running On My Mind,” “Used to You,” “If I Fall In Love,” and “Can’t Lie.” He worked with artists like Russ, Alessia Cara, and Tate McRae — amassing billions of global streams and receiving international acclaim.

Lyrics:
I can’t let you go
Trust me I’ve tried and
I swear I’m still trying to know 
How to move on
If somebody told me
I still wouldn’t know where to go
I’d follow the stars 
Wish I could see them - the sky feels so dark when you’re gone
I’d follow my heart - but you took it with you the day you walked out of that door 

No I can’t pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means I should forget 

Then even if I could I wouldn’t 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
Don’t matter if I should or shouldn’t 
I wouldn’t ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

You gave me hope 
Something to hold on - and look forward for 
And after it all - you left me with me scars and said that you were never involved 

You knew I was weak 
You sold me a dream and knew I would believe in your lies 
What’s wrong with me? 
I knew you were lying
But I had no courage to leave
And I can’t pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means that I should forget

Then even if I could I wouldn’t 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
Don’t matter if I should or shouldn’t 
It wouldn’t even matter anyway 

Then even if I could I wouldn’t 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
Don’t matter if I should or shouldn’t 
I wouldn’t ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya Albeh ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
Khaleeneh ma3ak
Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya omri ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
I can’t let you go

#OfficialMusicVideo #AliGatie #CantLetYouGo #WeAreWarnerRecords

snippet.title: iKON - ‘왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)’ M/V
snippet.description:
왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
 
사실 아직도 거짓말 같죠 
활짝 웃으며 올 것만 같죠
아름다웠던 모습 그대로 

이제 와서야 후회만 해요
웃는 게 이쁜 그댈 울리기만 했죠
내가 바란 건 이게 아닌데

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게 
하얗게 재만 남았죠 

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

내 꿈속에서도 멀어지는 너
아무것도 난 할 수가 없죠
멈춰보려 소리쳐도
눈을 뜨면 사라지죠
왜 네가 있을 때 잘해야 했던 걸
그때 난 몰랐을까
왜 모든 것들을 잃고 난 후에
소중함을 알게 될까

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게
하얗게 재만 남았죠

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

그때 마지막인 줄 알았다면 조금 더
네 모습을 담아뒀을 텐데

단 한 번도 사랑하지 않은 적 없죠
처음부터 지금까지도

snippet.title: Aina Abdul - Semalam | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88

Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

snippet.title: Zizi Kirana - Eh | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88
Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

2. Peluang Kedua - Nabila Razali
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

3. Belenggu Rindu - Wany Hasrita & Dato’ Jamal Abdillah
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

4. Aku Bidadari Syurgamu - Aishah
Komposer: Ippo Hafiz
Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

5. Hati - Hael Husaini
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

6. 7 Nasihat - Shiha Zikir, Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta
Komposer & Lirik: Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta

7. Semalam - Aina Abdul
Komposer & Lirik: Aina Abdul

8. Gundah - Ernie Zakri
Komposer & Lirik: Ernie Zakri & Sharon Paul

9. Jangan Khianati Aku - Azlan & The Typewriter
Komposer & Lirik: Dark

10. Kau Sakiti - Amir Masdi
Komposer & Lirik: Faizal Tahir, Mike Chan, Ezra Kong, Romeo & Mage

11. Gila - Kaka Azraff, Noki & Loca B
Komposer & Lirik: Noki, Loca B & Ezra Kong

12. EH - Zizi Kirana
Komposer: Navigator & Zizi Kirana
Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

#AJL35​

snippet.title: SABYAN - SAPU JAGAT (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
SABYAN - SAPU JAGAT (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)

Cipta : AYUS

Letihnya mencari jawaban misteri
Larut ku dalam lamunan angan tak bertepi
Jiwa yang tak tenang hati yang tenggelam
Khilaf ku untuk relakan sgala yg ku genggam 

Robbana atina fid duniya hasanah
Wa fil akhiroti hasanah wa qina 'adzabannar 

Rasa yg kau beri bukan yg ku pinta
Ku pasrah dan menerima ku serahkan semua
Jalan tak berarah kemana melangkah
Membawa cinta bersama luka yg kurasa 

Berserahku pada Nya tuk menggapai semua
Yakin ku cara Mu lah yang terbaik untuk ku
Bawa hati ku pergi tuk slalu bersama Mu
Demi kebaikan dunia dan keabadian

-----------------------------------------------

Follow instagram Sabyan Gambus
https://www.instagram.com/sabyan_gambus//

Vocal : Nissa 
Keyboard : Ayus
Percussion : Kamal

Audio by Oum Music !
Music producer : Ayus & Yeru 
Mixing & Mastering : Yeru at Oum Music
Music performed by : Sabyan 

Additional Musician !
Piano : Langen 
Guitar : Hedi Alfian 
Bass : Jalu Rohanda 
Drum programming : Yeru

snippet.title: [Stray Kids : SKZ-RECORD] Changbin, Felix "좋으니까"
snippet.description:
[Stray Kids(스트레이 키즈) : SKZ-RECORD(슼즈 레코드)] 창빈(Changbin), 필릭스(Felix) "좋으니까"

[Credits]
Lyrics by : 창빈 (3RACHA), 필릭스
Composed by : 창빈 (3RACHA), 방찬 (3RACHA)
Arranged by : 방찬 (3RACHA)
Original Publisher : JYP Publishing (KOMCA)

[Changbin, Felix “좋으니까” Lyrics]
네가 좋으니까
다른 이유는 없어 네가 좋으니까
그대 웃는 모습 바라보면 난 더는 바랄 게 없어
그냥 네가 좋으니까

괜히 묻고 싶어 너의 하루에 대해
너의 얘길 듣는 게 내 취미가 돼
하루 중 가장 짧게 느껴지는 시간
전부 듣고 싶어 너의 고민에 대해
다 들어주고 무거운 짐을 덜어줄게
하루 중 너의 어깨의 무게 가장 가벼울 수 있게
그 짐을 나에게 덜어줄래

맑은 너의 두 눈에 
근심걱정의 안개가 걷힐 때까지 더 기대도 돼
왜 힘든 건지 뭐가 너를 괴롭혔는지

이건 빈말이 아냐 다 대신 힘들고 아파 주고 싶어
너가 웃으면 덩달아서 기뻐
웃는 모습이 가장 예쁘지만
울고 싶을 땐 억지로 웃지마

행복으로 가득 찬 너의 눈동자는 yeah
조그만 충격에도 흘러내릴 물이란 걸
그걸 알기에 더 조심스러워져 
걱정돼 네가 좋으니까

그냥 네가 좋으니까
다른 이유는 없어 네가 좋으니까
그대 웃는 모습 바라보면 난 더는 바랄 게 없어
그냥 네가 좋으니까

같이 있고 싶어 온종일 하루 종일
감정 기복 없이 웃음으로 통일
어젠 울었지만 금방 좋아져서 다행이야 
촉촉함이 남은 반짝이는 눈망울은 다이아

그런 너의 솔직한 표정이 좋아
표정 연기 못하는 너라서 좋아
그니까 숨기지 마 그게 더 힘든 거
너가 더 잘 알잖아 

행복으로 가득 찬 너의 눈동자는 yeah
조그만 충격에도 흘러내릴 물이란 걸
그걸 알기에 더 조심스러워져 
걱정돼 네가 좋으니까

그냥 네가 좋으니까
다른 이유는 없어 네가 좋으니까
그대 웃는 모습 바라보면 난 더는 바랄 게 없어
그냥 네가 좋으니까

I just really love you
You’re the only reason why I really love you
When I see you smile I just can’t get enough and I can’t live without you
Baby I just really love you

Stray Kids Digital Single "ALL IN (Korean Ver.)"
iTunes & Apple Music: https://apple.co/33fWGbG​
Spotify: https://spoti.fi/3nYlixn​

Stray Kids Official YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/StrayKids​
Stray Kids Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JYPEStrayKids/​
Stray Kids Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realstraykids/​
Stray Kids Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/Stray_Kids​
Stray Kids Official Fan's: https://fans.jype.com/StrayKids​

#StrayKids​ #Changbin #Felix #좋으니까
#스트레이키즈​ #창빈 #필릭스
#SKZ_RECORD #슼즈레코드​

하루 중 가장 짧게 느껴지는 시간
전부 듣고 싶어 너의 고민에 대해
다 들어주고 무거운 짐을 덜어줄게
하루 중 너의 어깨의 무게 가장 가벼울 수 있게
그 짐을 나에게 덜어줄래

맑은 너의 두 눈에 
근심걱정의 안개가 걷힐 때까지 더 기대도 돼
왜 힘든 건지 뭐가 너를 괴롭혔는지

이건 빈말이 아냐 다 대신 힘들고 아파 주고 싶어
너가 웃으면 덩달아서 기뻐
웃는 모습이 가장 예쁘지만
울고 싶을 땐 억지로 웃지마

행복으로 가득 찬 너의 눈동자는 yeah
조그만 충격에도 흘러내릴 물이란 걸
그걸 알기에 더 조심스러워져 
걱정돼 네가 좋으니까

그냥 네가 좋으니까
다른 이유는 없어 네가 좋으니까
그대 웃는 모습 바라보면 난 더는 바랄 게 없어
그냥 네가 좋으니까

같이 있고 싶어 온종일 하루 종일
감정 기복 없이 웃음으로 통일
어젠 울었지만 금방 좋아져서 다행이야 
촉촉함이 남은 반짝이는 눈망울은 다이아

그런 너의 솔직한 표정이 좋아
표정 연기 못하는 너라서 좋아
그니까 숨기지 마 그게 더 힘든 거
너가 더 잘 알잖아 

행복으로 가득 찬 너의 눈동자는 yeah
조그만 충격에도 흘러내릴 물이란 걸
그걸 알기에 더 조심스러워져 
걱정돼 네가 좋으니까

그냥 네가 좋으니까
다른 이유는 없어 네가 좋으니까
그대 웃는 모습 바라보면 난 더는 바랄 게 없어
그냥 네가 좋으니까

I just really love you
You’re the only reason why I really love you
When I see you smile I just can’t get enough and I can’t live without you
Baby I just really love you

snippet.title: Kaka Azraff, Noki, Loca B - Gila | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88
Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

2. Peluang Kedua - Nabila Razali
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

3. Belenggu Rindu - Wany Hasrita & Dato’ Jamal Abdillah
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

4. Aku Bidadari Syurgamu - Aishah
Komposer: Ippo Hafiz
Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

5. Hati - Hael Husaini
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

6. 7 Nasihat - Shiha Zikir, Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta
Komposer & Lirik: Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta

7. Semalam - Aina Abdul
Komposer & Lirik: Aina Abdul

8. Gundah - Ernie Zakri
Komposer & Lirik: Ernie Zakri & Sharon Paul

9. Jangan Khianati Aku - Azlan & The Typewriter
Komposer & Lirik: Dark

10. Kau Sakiti - Amir Masdi
Komposer & Lirik: Faizal Tahir, Mike Chan, Ezra Kong, Romeo & Mage

11. Gila - Kaka Azraff, Noki & Loca B
Komposer & Lirik: Noki, Loca B & Ezra Kong

12. EH - Zizi Kirana
Komposer: Navigator & Zizi Kirana
Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

#AJL35​
